Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Avernus Travelers]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Avernus Travelers is a group that includes Ezera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Avernus Travelers ride on huge white eagles.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — An Avernus Traveler is a woman wearing brown buckskin clothing and feathers in her hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Avernus Travelers wear buckskin outfits and use feathers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — The Avernus Travelers surround Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Most of the Avernus Travelers were dead after the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — The Avernus Travelers are in a battle nearby.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Avernus Travelers with contacts among the Sarin make excellent spies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — An Avernus Traveler reported that Bel Calem is in flames to Leah.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — An Avernus Traveler is a type of traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Feiora seeks to unify the Avernus Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Some of the personnel borrowed from Cana were Avernus Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Avernus Travelers may suffer from an arrogant reliance on their powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — The narrator is not an Avernus Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — The Avernus Traveler wears an armored black outfit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Avernus Travelers share a bond with their birds.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
